meaning: n.天性,化妆品,补充,虚构,组成,结构,补考,体格
examples: She wore no makeup, and her face was dotted with acne.
She had a lot of makeup on and not a hair out of place.
Information about the genetic makeup of populations offers powerful new evidence for the consideration of anthropologists and historians.
Visitors are encouraged to wear their best fantasy costumes, accented with extreme makeup and, of course, body paint.
